batches.name: Original Styles - Batch 1
batches.rationale: Implement the remaining original design styles from the designprompts_dev_all_styles.md document.

tasks.title: Originals Set 1: academia, bold-typography, industrial, material
tasks.prompt: Implement these 4 original design styles: academia, bold-typography, industrial, material. Follow the design system defined in `designprompts_dev_all_styles.md`. Each style needs its own `app/styles/[slug]/page.tsx` with 10 sections as defined in `docs/architecture.md`. Update `lib/styles-registry.ts` when finished. Context: AGENTS.md.

batches.name: Version 2 - External Brands Set 1
batches.rationale: Implement the first set of 25 external brands from the awesome-design-md repo.

tasks.title: V2 Brands Set 1: airbnb, airtable, apple, bmw, cal
tasks.prompt: Implement these 5 external styles: airbnb, airtable, apple, bmw, cal. Research each style from `https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md/tree/main/design-md/[style-name]/DESIGN.md`. Each style needs its own `app/styles/[slug]/page.tsx` with 10 sections as defined in `docs/architecture.md`. Update `lib/styles-registry.ts` when finished. Context: AGENTS_V2.md.
